name: 質問型——婚姻的靈魂拷問
description: 用連續的反問句逼迫對方面對婚姻中的問題，每一句都擊中要害。這類對白節奏急促、情緒飽滿。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Where were you, Richard? The last 3 years when I was working myself to the bone for you and your family. Well, they treated me like trash. And now you're accusing me of cheating. What about Ruth? ... Why didn't you ever tell me she was your first love? Why did you save her first at the pool when we both fell in?
